name: Slack Lead Alert

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, message: 'Not a lead, skipped' }) }}

notes: Replace 'https://hooks.slack.com/services/YOUR/SLACK/WEBHOOK' in the 'Send to Slack' node with your actual Slack Incoming Webhook URL. Get one at: api.slack.com/apps → Your App → Incoming Webhooks.
